summary.title: [FinTrace GitHub Pages] No defects found across both post-change audit partitions
summary.one_line_description: Independent route and SEO plus deployment and integration sweeps found no concrete potential bug in the implemented GitHub Pages release.

bug_1.file_locations: - /Users/sacino/fintrace-root/src/app/page.tsx - component: `HomePage` - /Users/sacino/fintrace-root/src/app/engine-network/EngineNetworkPage.tsx - component: `EngineNetworkPage` - /Users/sacino/fintrace-root/src/app/internal-design/page.tsx - component: `DesignLabIndex` - /Users/sacino/fintrace-root/src/app/internal-design-metadata.ts - constant: `internalRobots` - /Users/sacino/fintrace-root/src/app/layout.tsx - metadata: `metadata` - /Users/sacino/fintrace-root/src/app/sitemap.ts - function: `sitemap` - /Users/sacino/fintrace-root/src/app/robots.ts - function: `robots` - /Users/sacino/fintrace-root/next.config.ts - constant: `nextConfig` - /Users/sacino/fintrace-root/.github/workflows/deploy.yml - jobs: `build`, `deploy`

issue_description.description: No concrete potential bug was found across the two independent audit partitions. The route and SEO sweep found that production `/` renders the shared Engine Network presentation without an internal-lab link, `/engine-network/` retains its comparison link and production canonical, the gallery registers all 11 candidates, all 12 internal URLs emit the required robots directives, and sitemap, robots, trailing-slash, and static 404 outputs match the plan. The deployment and integration sweep found that the workflow uses the required triggers, permissions, concurrency, build dependency, native Pages actions, `out` artefact, and `github-pages` environment. It also confirmed the static-export settings, required published routes and assets, successful push-triggered run `29584302589`, and absence of a `gh-pages` branch, CNAME file, deployment secret, third-party deploy action, or secret reference.
issue_description.code_example: ```text Independent reports: - subagent_bug_sweep_20260717_route_seo_a7f3.xml: 0 potential bugs - subagent_bug_sweep_20260717_pages_integration_b9c1.xml: 0 potential bugs ```
issue_description.expected_vs_actual: | Aspect | Expected | Actual | |--------|----------|--------| | **Production routes** | Engine Network at `/`; unlinked noindex lab and candidates retained | Route, navigation, robots, canonical, sitemap, and static artefact contracts matched | | **Deployment** | Native Pages workflow validates, exports, uploads, and deploys pushes to `main` | Workflow structure matched and push-triggered run `29584302589` completed successfully | | **Security** | No deployment secret, generated branch, CNAME file, or third-party deploy action | None was found | | **Audit result** | Concrete regressions are reported for independent verification | Both workers reported no potential bugs |
